action.description:
Introduced by Senators Carpenter, L. Johnson, Larson, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Palmeri, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Joers, Madison, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Prado, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Tenorio, Vining and Snodgrass
